@graph.name: LIRE descriptive profile + data-artefact audit (2026-04-23)
@graph.description: Reproducible descriptive profile of the LIRE v3.0 Latin inscription corpus at dataset, province, and urban-area subset levels, with data-artefact audit against documented EDH/EDCS inheritance issues. Produced by a serial data-profile-scout (proposer) + data-profile-verifier (adversarial verifier) agent chain under the saross/inscriptions project.
@graph.license: TBD — to be set when the conference paper's supplementary material is deposited on Zenodo

@graph.name: Run specification
@graph.description: Inputs, configurations, expected outputs, decision-points, and success criteria for this run.

@graph.name: Dataset and environment provenance
@graph.description: Source dataset DOI, schema source, interpreter, parameters, and session context at invocation.

@graph.name: Agents used
@graph.description: Canonical agent definitions (proposer and verifier), execution vehicle for this session, and dispatch pattern.

@graph.name: Decisions encountered
@graph.description: Judgement calls logged by agents during execution.

@graph.name: Agent invocation briefs
@graph.description: Exact prompts sent to proposer and verifier for this run.

@graph.name: Seed artefacts
@graph.description: Supporting files inherited at invocation time (e.g., the LIST/LIRE schema dictionary).

@graph.name: Agent outputs
@graph.description: Profile reports, CSV tables, artefact checks, corrections, and verdict — populated by the agent chain.
